element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns basic move set for chosen character
Foundation for combat system; repetitive enemy encounters throughout
Escalates threat level; more dangerous than basic thugs
Environmental shift; follows San Francisco digger confrontation
Boss-level threats requiring mastered combat skills
Climactic location where all symbiotes are confronted

element_introduction_order.element: Cameo assistance (Captain America, Ghost Rider, Hawkeye, Daredevil)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Support mechanics that aid in combat situations

typical_tension_triggers: Continuous flow of unavoidable hits (noted as cheap combat mechanic)
Constant stream of heavily armed enemies
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Relentless forward momentum with repetitive combat encounters; critics noted monotonous level designs and constant enemy pressure without significant variety or breathing room

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic thug encounters introduce fundamental beat 'em up mechanics; manageable difficulty for character learning
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of armed Jury enemies and environmental shift to underground city; moderate escalation in threat level and enemy variety
difficulty_curve.late_game: Symbiote children and boss encounters at Life Foundation headquarters; dangerous threat level requiring mastered combat mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Initial setting where players confront the digger; establishes story grounding in Lethal Protector narrative
Mid-game environmental shift revealing hidden civilization; story-driven level progression following established comic book arc
Repeated encounters with same enemy types (heavily armed Jury, symbiote children); criticized for monotonous and unoriginal design lacking significant variation
Final level featuring confrontation with all five symbiotes; climactic encounter combining story resolution with ultimate difficulty spike

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Separation Anxiety SNES page)
wikipedia (Venom/Spider-Man: Separation Anxiety article with plot and reception data)
